betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Truth; spoken, shared in secret, screamed out loud.
Truth; origin of oppression, conflict, and war.
Truth that can kill, but must nevertheless be spoken.
The immediate desire to share a newly acquired truth is one of the paramount aspects of the conscious experience. A truth that may be invonvenient, or hard to reconcile. A truth that could start a war.
And yet, a truth that must be shared, if only because it is a truth.
And being able to speak that truth, and to accept its consequences, that too is worthiness.
